source_note: Public sanitized CI/CD environment model for Admin preview and future app dashboards.

environments.name: development
environments.purpose: Build experimental features without touching the stable public entrypoint.
environments.url_pattern: dev-funnel-preview.md currently defines the safe dev funnel requirements; executable dev page not yet enabled
environments.promotion_rule: Developer validation only. No owner PASS required.
environments.rollback_rule: Delete or ignore failed dev build. Never promote directly to production.

environments.name: testing
environments.purpose: Check loading, mobile layout, navigation, visual status, app scope, and data integrity.
environments.promotion_rule: Must pass basic smoke tests before pre-prod.
environments.rollback_rule: Failed test build stays out of pre-prod/prod.

environments.name: production
environments.purpose: Stable public Admin preview on GitHub Pages.
environments.promotion_rule: Only owner-visible PASS builds or safe patches should reach production.
environments.rollback_rule: Return entrypoint to last stable build and disable failed build files.

required_pipeline: Build -> Dev -> Test -> Pre-Prod -> Owner PASS -> Production -> Monitor -> Rollback if needed
current_gap: The dashboard currently has GitHub Pages production and manual owner-visible testing. Dev funnel requirements now exist, but executable dev/test/pre-prod gates are not yet automated.
next_safe_action: Build CR-016 Capability Funnel as isolated dev executable after the dev funnel preview requirements are owner-reviewed.
